records.question: Which physicians have a social security number at least 777777777 and also have a department where they are the head, as well as records in affiliated_with, trained_in, and undergoes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN affiliated_with ON physician.employeeid = affiliated_with.physician
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
JOIN undergoes ON physician.employeeid = undergoes.physician
WHERE physician.ssn >= 777777777
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.EmployeeID
FROM Physician AS T1
WHERE T1.SSN >= 777777777
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Department AS T2
    WHERE T2.Head = T1.EmployeeID
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Affiliated_With AS T3
    WHERE T3.Physician = T1.EmployeeID
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Trained_In AS T4
    WHERE T4.Physician = T1.EmployeeID
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Undergoes AS T5
    WHERE T5.Physician = T1.EmployeeID
  )

records.question: Which physicians lead the Surgery department and have certifications that started on or after 2008-01-01 and expire exactly on 2008-12-31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
WHERE trained_in.certificationexpires = '2008-12-31' AND department.name = 'Surgery' AND trained_in.certificationdate >= '2008-01-01'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.EmployeeID FROM Physician AS T1 INNER JOIN Department AS T2 ON T1.EmployeeID = T2.Head INNER JOIN Trained_In AS T3 ON T1.EmployeeID = T3.Physician WHERE T2.Name = 'Surgery' AND T3.CertificationDate >= '2008-01-01' AND T3.CertificationExpires = '2008-12-31'

records.question: Which Surgical Attending Physicians were trained on or before 2008-01-01 in procedures that cost at least 5600.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
JOIN procedures ON trained_in.treatment = procedures.code
JOIN undergoes ON procedures.code = undergoes.procedures
WHERE physician.position = 'Surgical Attending Physician' AND trained_in.certificationdate <= '2008-01-01' AND procedures.cost >= 5600.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.EmployeeID FROM Physician AS T1 INNER JOIN Trained_In AS T2 ON T1.EmployeeID = T2.Physician INNER JOIN Procedures AS T3 ON T2.Treatment = T3.Code WHERE T1.Position = 'Surgical Attending' AND T2.CertificationDate <= '2008-01-01' AND T3.Cost >= 5600.0

records.question: Which physicians are Attending Psychiatrists with an SSN of at least 999999999 who worked with nurses where the position is Nurse, and those nurses were on call on or after 2008-11-04 11:00?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN appointment ON physician.employeeid = appointment.physician
JOIN nurse ON appointment.prepnurse = nurse.employeeid
JOIN on_call ON nurse.employeeid = on_call.nurse
WHERE physician.ssn >= 999999999 AND nurse.position = 'Nurse' AND on_call.oncallstart >= '2008-11-04 11:00' AND physician.position = 'Attending Psychiatrist'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.EmployeeID
FROM Physician AS T1
WHERE T1.Position = 'Attending Psychiatrist' AND T1.SSN >= 999999999
  AND T1.EmployeeID IN (
    SELECT T2.Physician
    FROM Appointment AS T2
    WHERE T2.PrepNurse IN (
      SELECT T3.EmployeeID
      FROM Nurse AS T3
      JOIN On_Call AS T4
        ON T3.EmployeeID = T4.Nurse
      WHERE T3.Position = 'Nurse' AND T4.OnCallStart >= '2008-11-04 11:00'
    )
    UNION
    SELECT T5.Physician
    FROM Undergoes AS T5
    WHERE T5.AssistingNurse IN (
      SELECT T6.EmployeeID
      FROM Nurse AS T6
      JOIN On_Call AS T7
        ON T6.EmployeeID = T7.Nurse
      WHERE T6.Position = 'Nurse' AND T7.OnCallStart >= '2008-11-04 11:00'
    )
  )

  T1.EmployeeID
FROM Physician AS T1
INNER JOIN Trained_In AS T2
  ON T1.EmployeeID = T2.Physician
INNER JOIN Procedures AS T3
  ON T2.Treatment = T3.Code
INNER JOIN Undergoes AS T4
  ON T1.EmployeeID = T4.Physician AND T3.Code = T4.Procedures
WHERE
  T1.Name = 'John Wen' AND T1.Position = 'Surgical Attending' AND T3.Name = 'Obfuscated Dermogastrotomy' AND T3.Cost <= 4899.0 AND T2.CertificationDate <= '2008-01-01' AND T2.CertificationExpires <= '2008-12-31' AND T4.DateUndergoes <= '2008-05-09'

records.question: Which physicians had appointments starting on or after 2008-04-24 10:00 with nurses whose on-call shifts ended on or before 2008-11-04 19:00?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN appointment ON physician.employeeid = appointment.physician
JOIN nurse ON appointment.prepnurse = nurse.employeeid
JOIN on_call ON nurse.employeeid = on_call.nurse
WHERE appointment.start >= '2008-04-24 10:00' AND on_call.oncallend <= '2008-11-04 19:00'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.EmployeeID
FROM Physician AS T1
INNER JOIN Appointment AS T2
  ON T1.EmployeeID = T2.Physician
INNER JOIN Nurse AS T3
  ON T2.PrepNurse = T3.EmployeeID
INNER JOIN On_Call AS T4
  ON T3.EmployeeID = T4.Nurse
WHERE
  T2.Start >= '2008-04-24 10:00' AND T4.OnCallEnd <= '2008-11-04 19:00'

records.question: Who is the Surgical Attending Physician named John Wen, with an SSN of at least 777777777, who heads the Surgery department, has a primary affiliation, underwent a procedure on 2008-05-03, and whose training certifications started on or after 2008-01-01 and expire on or after 2008-12-31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN affiliated_with ON physician.employeeid = affiliated_with.physician
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
JOIN undergoes ON physician.employeeid = undergoes.physician
WHERE department.name = 'Surgery' AND physician.ssn >= 777777777 AND undergoes.dateundergoes = '2008-05-03' AND trained_in.certificationexpires >= '2008-12-31' AND physician.position = 'Surgical Attending Physician' AND affiliated_with.primaryaffiliation = 1 AND physician.name = 'John Wen' AND trained_in.certificationdate >= '2008-01-01'
